sql.up: CREATE TABLE chapter ("keyId" uuid NOT NULL, slug varchar(255) NOT NULL, href varchar(6) NOT NULL, text varchar(255) NOT NULL, chapter int NOT NULL, title varchar NOT NULL, "pubDate" date NOT NULL, updated timestamp(3) NOT NULL, published boolean NOT NULL, description varchar(255), notes varchar(255), endnotes varchar(255), body xml NOT NULL, CONSTRAINT chapter_pkey PRIMARY KEY ("keyId"))
